summary.intent: Debug and fix failing Jenkins layered-products builds that were crashing due to GitHub App multi-installation ambiguity errors when trying to create git-auth secrets for Konflux builds.
summary.outcome: Implemented fix by adding `get_github_app_token_for_org()` function and updating `ensure_git_auth_secret()` to accept org parameter (defaulting to 'openshift-priv'), enabling proper installation resolution. All 35 tests pass with no lint errors.

repo: GitHub App is installed in 4 orgs: 'operator-framework', 'openshift-priv', 'openshift', 'openshift-eng'
Build pipeline has two phases: rebase (uses org-aware URL-based token generation) and build (was using bare token generation without org context)
Git-auth secrets in Konflux PipelineRuns are used for git-clone tasks pulling from openshift-priv repos
Default org for build operations is 'openshift-priv'

code.finding: _auto_detect_single_installation() raises ValueError when GitHub App has multiple installations and no explicit installation_id is set
ensure_git_auth_secret() was calling get_github_app_token_from_env() without org context, causing multi-installation ambiguity
Existing _generate_app_token_for_url() and _resolve_installation_id() already correctly handle org-based installation resolution

workflow: Pattern of rebase succeeding but build failing indicated two different code paths handling authentication
Examining multiple failing builds (1806, 1813, 1816) confirmed systematic vs one-off issue
Build 1812 was a false lead - different error caused by missing image definition in ocp-build-data, not auth issue

friction: GitHub App authentication was inconsistent - org-aware path used by rebase, but build phase used bare token generation
Build 1812 appeared to be a different error but was actually a data problem (missing oadp-velero-restic-restore-helper in ocp-build-data oadp-1.5 branch)
open_items: Need to commit and push the changes (user requested at end of transcript)
Should verify fix works in actual Jenkins builds after deployment
This appears part of larger branch effort: github-app-transient-git-auth-secret
